## Validation

- [ ] `uv run pytest`
- [ ] `bash -n start.sh`
- [ ] `docker compose config --quiet`
- [ ] `docker compose build` when Docker/gateway changes are included

## IBKR Safety

- [ ] No credentials, tokens, account IDs, session IDs, or raw gateway logs are included
- [ ] Live-account behavior was tested only with read-only endpoints
